name: Fettucine Asparagus with Shiitake and Smoked Bacon
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Smoked bacon or pancetta, cut into 1/2 inch dice
1 lb Asparagus, cut into 2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet until crisp. Remove it to a plate.
2. Drain off any excess fat from the skillet. Add olive oil and cook the mushrooms until softened.
3. Lightly blanch the asparagus.
4. Cook the pasta briefly in boiling salted water. Drain the noodles.
5. Combine the drained noodles with the asparagus, bacon, shiitake, and fresh herbs. Season with salt and pepper.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 667.4 calories; 35 grams total fat; (9.9 grams saturated fat); 27.7 grams protein; 56.8 grams carbohydrates; 175.5 milligrams cholesterol; 709.7 milligrams sodium.
